title: Notification Emails assigns and item vs self-assigns item
excerpt: Currently notifications do not account for who is taking the action. I do not want an email telling me I assigned something to myself. I know I did. I do want an email if someone else assigns me something.

posts.author: dbcgroup (Alex Rosenberg)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently notifications do not account for who is taking the action. I do not want an email telling me I assigned something to myself. I know I did. I do want an email if someone else assigns me something.

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml:
This has gone completely unnoticed but I totally agree.
I would like to disable assign automations by the user itself and automations.
